extractionMethod: Screenshots (Central, The 2nd Floor, Grillhouse) + existing content-inventory.json + subpages.ts data
notes: WebFetch cannot render Framer's client-side JS. Pages for Tradewinds, Union Bar, The Gourmet Pantry, Uncorked, and Essentials were extracted from existing project data only (no Framer screenshots available). Content marked with [FROM SCREENSHOT] was read from Framer prototype screenshots. Content marked [FROM EXISTING DATA] was taken from subpages.ts or content-inventory.json. Items marked [NEEDS VERIFICATION] should be checked against the live Framer prototype.

pages.name: Central
pages.description:
Have a cup of joe, bagels, pastries and salads at this contemporary café with counter service and self check-out kiosk. Customised cake orders must be placed at least 7 working days in advance.

No wet attire allowed in the café.
pages.imageNote: [NEEDS VERIFICATION] - image shows woman at café counter selecting pastries

gallery.heading: Photo Gallery
gallery.images: [NEEDS VERIFICATION] - gallery section visible but no images loaded in screenshot

pages.name: The 2nd Floor
pages.description:
Amidst the plethora of fusion restaurants in Singapore, none is as exquisite as the award-winning The 2nd Floor. The first suggests the Chinese character for 2, "èr" (二). The Eastern menu is in perfect harmony with authentic Asian flavors and unique contemporary presentations.

The Western menu is an interpretation of the Modern American Steakhouse and combines rustic ambiance with fine dining fare. The restaurant showcased the Excellent Dining Venue award at the prestigious World of Chef par Excellence® Culinaire Competition.
pages.hours:
Tuesday to Sunday:
Lunch: 11:30 a.m. – 2:30 p.m.
Dinner: 5:30 p.m. – 10:00 p.m.
The 2nd Floor is closed on Mondays.
pages.imageNote: Image shows two women dining/talking at the restaurant

extraSections.title: Wine Corkage Policy
extraSections.content: Enjoy complimentary corkage with every bottle purchased from our restaurant. Standard corkage is $30 per bottle.

extraSections.title: Reservation
extraSections.content: Or contact The 2nd Floor at 6739-4329 or 2ndfloor@amclub.org.sg to make a reservation.

extraSections.title: Wine Corkage Policy
extraSections.content:
Third-party wines: $40 per bottle.
Wines brought by Member for own consumption: $30 per bottle.

extraSections.title: Cancellation Policy
extraSections.content: Reservations cancelled within 24 hours will incur a $35 per person 'No Consideration Fee' (complimentary or modified to ensure pax are not committed). Contact via phone for cancellation.

pages.extraSectionsSource: [FROM SCREENSHOT] - some text partially legible, may need verification

pages.name: Grillhouse & Tiki Bar
pages.breadcrumbNote: [FROM SCREENSHOT] - breadcrumb shows 'Central' which appears to be a bug in the prototype; should be 'Grillhouse'
pages.description:
Welcome to a casual poolside dining restaurant – perfect for families with children and swimmers looking to have a delicious meal.

Devour authentic American cuisine featuring Texas-style BBQ, mouth-watering burgers, delicious pizzas and salads with ice-cold American beer and special Grillhouse shakes.
pages.descriptionNote: First paragraph has a 'Made in Framer' watermark partially obscuring text after 'delicious'

pages.name: The Gourmet Pantry
pages.description:
The Gourmet Pantry brings together an excellent selection of wines, featuring more than 100 American wine labels alongside over 300 international labels, thoughtfully curated for every occasion – from easy-drinking table wines to premium selections and celebratory bubblies.

Complementing the wine collection is a distinctive range of homeware and table settings, making it a convenient, one-stop destination for both everyday needs and special moments.

commonPageStructure.description: Based on the 3 screenshots available, all dining sub-pages follow a consistent layout pattern

layout.hero: Split layout - left half has venue photo, right half has venue name in large italic heading font
layout.breadcrumb: Home / Dining & Retail / [Venue Name] at top

infoPanel.typeLabel: Category label above venue name (e.g. 'CAFÉ', 'FUSION FINE DINING', 'AMERICAN BBQ AND GRILL')
infoPanel.venueName: Large heading in Noto Serif italic
infoPanel.ctas: Row of CTA buttons: 'View Menu' and 'Promotions' with arrow icons
infoPanel.openingHours: Section with clock icon, heading 'Opening Hours', day groups and times
infoPanel.locationContact: Section with location pin icon, heading 'Location & Contact', level, phone (with phone icon), email (with email icon)

layout.additionalSections: Venue-specific sections (e.g. Wine Corkage Policy, Reservation for The 2nd Floor; Tiki Bar Hours for Grillhouse)
layout.gallery: Photo Gallery section heading (placeholder in prototype)
layout.faq: Optional FAQ accordion section (seen on The 2nd Floor page)
